revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 両神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎838 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[伊弉諾尊]]、[[伊弉冉尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月14日-16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎（すざき）にある[[神社]]<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[伊弉諾尊]] * [[伊弉冉尊]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:りようしんしや しもたし}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:下田市の建築物]] [[Category:下田市の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 両神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎838 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[伊弉諾尊]]、[[伊弉冉尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月14日-16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎（すざき）にある[[神社]]<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。
== 概要 == 下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[伊弉諾尊]] * [[伊弉冉尊]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:りようしんしや しもたし}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:下田市の建築物]] [[Category:下田市の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 両神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎838 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[伊弉諾尊]]、[[伊弉冉尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月14日-16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎（すざき）にある[[神社]]<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。
== 概要 == 下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[伊弉諾尊]] * [[伊弉冉尊]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:りようしんしや しもたし}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:下田市の建築物]] [[Category:下田市の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{Infobox religious building | name = Ryou Shrine | native_name = 両神社 (下田市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ryou Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.657556|138.966667}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 両神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎838 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[伊弉諾尊]]、[[伊弉冉尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月14日-16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎（すざき）にある[[神社]]<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。
== 概要 == 下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[伊弉諾尊]] * [[伊弉冉尊]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:りようしんしや しもたし}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:下田市の建築物]] [[Category:下田市の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]
==End Japanese==

{{translated page|ja|両神社 (下田市)|version=103516885|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 両神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎838 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[伊弉諾尊]]、[[伊弉冉尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月14日-16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[下田市]]須崎（すざき）にある[[神社]]<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。
== 概要 == 下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[伊弉諾尊]] * [[伊弉冉尊]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:下田市の建築物]] [[Category:下田市の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

'''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|下田市|Q653402}}須崎（すざき）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。

== 概要 ==
下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|伊弉諾尊}}
* {{jalink|伊弉冉尊}}

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}

== 外部リンク ==
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁


==End Japanese==

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

[[JA:両神社 (下田市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q134930603}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称 = 両神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=下田市}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|下田市|Q653402}}須崎838
|位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|伊弉諾尊}}、{{jalink|伊弉冉尊}}
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}
|創建   = 
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = 10月14日-16日
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=両神社|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|39|27.2|N|138|58|0|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''両神社'''（りょうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|下田市|Q653402}}須崎（すざき）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。地名を冠して'''須崎両神社'''（すざきりょうじんじゃ）とも称される。

=== 概要 ===
下田市の南東、須崎(すざき)地区の中心部、須崎港の北方至近に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''佐伎多麻比咩命神社'''（さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ）や'''穂都佐気命神社'''（ほつさけのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm 両神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html 両神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|伊弉諾尊}}
* {{jalink|伊弉冉尊}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 両神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{jalink|Shimoda City|Q653402}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{jalink|Izanagi-no-Mikoto}}
* {{jalink|Izanami-no-Mikoto}}

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{jalink|Shimoda City|Q653402}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{jalink|Izanagi-no-Mikoto}}
* {{jalink|Izanami-no-Mikoto}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{jalink|Shimoda City|Q653402}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{jalink|Izanagi-no-Mikoto}}
* {{jalink|Izanami-no-Mikoto}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{jalink|Shimoda City|Q653402}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{jalink|Izanagi-no-Mikoto}}
* {{jalink|Izanami-no-Mikoto}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{jalink|Shimoda City|Q653402}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{jalink|Izanagi-no-Mikoto}}
* {{jalink|Izanami-no-Mikoto}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Shinto shrine

|Image = {{Image needed|cat=Shimoda City}}

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill||lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}
* {{ill||lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q813858}}
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q813858}}
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===

* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|WD=Q813858}}
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===

* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===

* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|WD=Q682306}}

{{nihongo|'''Ryou Shrine'''|両神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Ryō Shrine''' (りょうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Suzaki, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|WD=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref name="jinjacho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401074 Ryō Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. Taking its name from the locality, it is also called '''Suzaki Ryō Shrine''' (すざきりょうじんじゃ).

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southeastern part of Shimoda City, in the central area of the Suzaki district, immediately north of Suzaki Port.

The date of establishment is unknown, but it is an ancient shrine that is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Sakitamahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (さきたまひめのみことじんじゃ) and '''Hotsusake-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (ほつさけのみことじんじゃ)<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ryou_title.htm Ryō Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140105-04.html Ryō Shrine] - Survey of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.
